82383235.title: 2026 British Indoor Athletics Championships

pageprops.wikibase-shortdesc: Indoor track and field competition for British athletes

82383235.description: Indoor track and field competition for British athletes
82383235.extract: The 2026 British Indoor Athletics Championships, also known as the 2026 UK Athletics Indoor Championships  is the national indoor track and field competition for British athletes,  held on 14 and 15 February 2026 at Arena Birmingham. The competition serves indirectly as a qualification event for the  2026 World Athletics Indoor Championships shortly afterwards but is not a formal trials.
